home.hero_subtitle: Explore what people think on topics that matter — across countries, languages, and demographics.
home.how_step1_desc: Explore topics spanning politics, science, culture, and more. Filter by language, category, or what's trending.
home.how_step2_desc: Cast your opinion anonymously or as a member. Your demographic profile enriches the data for everyone.
home.how_step3_desc: See how the world really thinks — broken down by country, age, and language. Real data, real people.

topics.empty_description: Try adjusting your search or filters.

topic.login_to_vote: Sign in to share your opinion

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to your OpiWo account
auth.register_subtitle: You're almost there — just a few details to get started.
auth.phone_subtitle: We'll send a 6-digit code via SMS to verify your identity.
auth.phone_hint: International format — include your country code.
auth.otp_hint: Enter the code exactly as received. It expires in 10 minutes.
auth.resend_success: A new code has been sent.
auth.display_name_hint: 2–50 characters. This is how others will see you.
auth.country_hint: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code — two letters, e.g. US, GB, ES.
auth.sign_out_error: Failed to sign out. Please try again.
auth.error_invalid_phone: Invalid phone number. Please use international format.
auth.error_too_many_requests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth.error_otp_delivery_failed: We couldn't send the SMS. Please try again.
auth.error_otp_invalid: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
auth.error_token_invalid: Your session has expired. Please start over.
auth.error_display_name_invalid: Display name must be between 2 and 50 characters.
auth.error_display_name_taken: This display name is already taken.
auth.error_display_name_blocked: This display name is not allowed.
auth.error_birth_year_invalid: Please enter a valid birth year.
auth.error_country_invalid: Please enter a valid 2-letter country code.
auth.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.contact_subtitle: Enter your phone number or email to continue.
auth.email_hint: We'll send a one-time verification code to this address.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.history_empty: You haven't submitted any opinions yet.

errors.not_found_description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
errors.server_description: We couldn't load this page. Please try again.

footer.tagline: The world's opinion, quantified. Explore what people think on topics that matter.

pending_topics.title: Shape what's next
pending_topics.subtitle: These topics are waiting for community approval. Vote to help the best ones get published.
pending_topics.empty: No topics waiting for votes right now.
pending_topics.teaser_body: OpiWo topics are community-approved. Members vote on submitted topics — the best ones rise to the top and get published for the world to answer.

opinion_form.title: What do you think?
opinion_form.subtitle: Select your answer below
opinion_form.change_answer_subtitle: Select a different option to update your vote
opinion_form.locked_days: You can change your answer in {days} day(s)
opinion_form.locked_inline: You can change your answer in {days} day(s). You can still try — your request will be processed once the lock period expires.
opinion_form.sign_in_subtitle: Sign in to vote and see how the world thinks
opinion_form.voted_change_hint: Changed your mind? Select a different option to update.
opinion_form.voted_locked_hint: You can update your answer in {days} day(s).

topic_detail.results_total: {count, plural, one {# opinion} other {# opinions}} submitted
topic_detail.results_error: Could not load results. Please try again.
topic_detail.locked_results_subtitle: Sign in to see how everyone voted on this topic.
topic_detail.locked_demographics_subtitle: Explore how different groups voted on this topic.
topic_detail.locked_trend_title: Sign in to see trend data
topic_detail.locked_trend_subtitle: See how opinions on this topic have changed over time.
topic_detail.demographics_total: {count, plural, one {# response} other {# responses}} with demographic data
topic_detail.trend_empty: Not enough data to show a trend yet.
